text: In this dim, silent space, time seems suspended. The glass doors, the cold utility of emergency equipment, and the shadows evoke a sense of isolation. The letters 'R+D' on the wall whisper of innovation and intellect, yet the darkness softens ambition with uncertainty. I feel a quiet, uneasy calm—caught between curiosity and anticipation, but also subtly aware of the loneliness permeating these empty halls.
